---
output: github_document
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# `ringR`
___

## Installation

Install the development version of `ringR` with:

```{r install, eval=FALSE}
pak::pak("mottensmann/ringR")
```


## Run shiny app

```{r example, eval=FALSE}
library(ringR)
ring_app()
```
